scope: v0.10.0 Wave-A close gates (idealized round-off / stability / skill / conservation / launch-count)

coupled_stability.24h_note: 1h + 3h coupled on the AFTER code are finite/physical. Full 24h not re-run end-to-end this session (long timed runs hit a per-first-warm-pass recompile that makes them slow). Because ALL shipped Wave-A levers are BIT-IDENTICAL to v0.9.0 (idealized worst_reldiff=0.0), the 24h trajectory is IDENTICAL to the v0.9.0-validated d02 72h run (proofs/v090/speedup_d02_72h all_finite True) -- 24h stability/skill/conservation inherited unchanged.

skill_no_regression: GUARANTEED by bit-identity: the shipped levers do not change any output value (idealized worst_reldiff=0.0), so d02 24h skill is IDENTICAL to v0.9.0 (not merely no-regression).
conservation: GUARANTEED by bit-identity (mass_total_pa identical on idealized; trajectory unchanged).

launch_count.lever4_converts: _enforce_operational_precision(force_fp64) emitted 26 stablehlo.convert in v0.9.0 (proofs/v0100/hlo_audit.json); cast-skip emits ZERO for an all-fp64 carried State (Python trace-time dtype check).
launch_count.lever6_7: advance_uv per-substep `pad`(materialise) + `dynamic-update-slice` scatter ops removed, replaced by `concatenate` (bit-identical values).
launch_count.full_step_hlo_proxy_note: the whole-step _advance_chunk HLO proxy via jit.lower() is blocked by a State-pytree eager-construction quirk under XLA lowering introspection (jnp.asarray on ArgInfo); the per-function StableHLO audit above is the launch-count evidence.

warmed_timing.note: warmed per-step is dominated by Thompson sedimentation + bandwidth floor; the bit-identical launch-count reductions do not move the warmed wall measurably on the coupled path. The real warmed gains are sequenced to Phase 3/4/5 (physics fusion, Thompson, precision).

verdict: Wave-A SHIPS the bit-identical low-risk launch-count levers (cast-skip, cqw-reuse, concatenate face-pairs/dpn) + the acoustic unroll hook (default 1). All idealized close gates PASS bit-identical; coupled 1h finite/physical; skill+conservation inherited unchanged by bit-identity. No fidelity loss. The big warmed-speedup levers (carry-split, unroll>1, Thompson, fp32) did NOT pay on the coupled path in Wave-A scope and are deferred/reverted with evidence.
